hero.subtitle: Experience world-class dental care where cutting-edge technology meets luxury comfort. Our award-winning specialists craft smiles that change lives.

about.description: For over two decades, Elite Dental Clinic has been the trusted destination for families seeking exceptional dental care in a luxurious, welcoming environment.
about.storyText1: Founded in 2003, Elite Dental Clinic was born from a simple yet powerful vision: to redefine dental care by combining clinical excellence with an unparalleled patient experience.
about.storyText2: Our vision is to be the global benchmark for dental excellence. Our mission is to transform lives through healthy, beautiful smiles — delivered with compassion, precision, and state-of-the-art technology.
about.visionText: To be the global benchmark for dental excellence and patient care.
about.missionText: Transforming lives through healthy, beautiful smiles with compassion and precision.

features.techDesc: Latest dental equipment and digital diagnostics
features.careDesc: Your comfort and health are our top priority

services.description: From routine check-ups to complete smile makeovers, we offer a full spectrum of dental services using the latest technology and techniques.

doctors.description: Our team of internationally trained, board-certified dental specialists brings decades of combined experience to deliver exceptional results.

gallery.description: See the life-changing results our patients have achieved. Drag the slider to compare before and after.

testimonials.description: Real stories from real patients who have experienced the Elite Dental difference.

appointment.name: Full Name
appointment.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your dental concerns...
appointment.successText: We'll confirm your appointment shortly via email and phone. Thank you for choosing Elite Dental!

insurance.description: We work with most major insurance providers to make quality dental care accessible.

footer.desc: Transforming smiles and changing lives through exceptional dental care since 2003.
